title: Monkfish in a Yorkshire Pudding Crust
description: A traditional British dish where monkfish is wrapped in a Yorkshire pudding crust, resulting in a crispy exterior and a tender interior. This recipe serves 4 and is a great option for a weekend dinner.
instructions: Season the monkfish fillets with the special British seasonings.
In a large bowl combine the flour and eggs, gradually add the milk, and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
Dip each monkfish fillet into the batter, coating evenly.
Place the battered monkfish fillets in the baking dish.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until the Yorkshire pudding crust is golden brown and the fish is cooked through.
